title: If You Could Read My Mind
album: If You Could Read My Mind
why_this_song: If You Could Read My Mind by Gordon Lightfoot (1970) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 5 times; first heard in: "If you could read my mind, love"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Just like an old time movie"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "'Bout a ghost from a wishin' well"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You know that ghost is me"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And I've got to say that I just don't get it"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: If you could read my mind, love
What a tale my thoughts could tell
Just like an old time movie
'Bout a ghost from a wishin' well
I don't know where we went wrong
But the feeling's gone and I just can't get it back
If you could read my mind, love
What a tale my thoughts could tell

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "read" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "read" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "movie" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "movie" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: If you could read my mind, love
I don't know where we went wrong

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: What a tale my thoughts could tell
I'd walk away, like a movie star
Just like an old time movie

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "If You Could Read My Mind" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "If You Could Read My Mind"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Gordon Lightfoot one question about "If You Could Read My Mind", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Gordon Lightfoot sobre "If You Could Read My Mind", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "If You Could Read My Mind" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "If You Could Read My Mind" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
